hero.title: Professional Fasteners for Global Markets
hero.subtitle: Quality fasteners from China to the world — 20+ years of manufacturing excellence

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: High-quality fasteners for construction, industrial, and manufacturing applications

drywall_screws.name: Drywall Screws
drywall_screws.desc: Bugle head drywall screws for gypsum board installation. Coarse and fine thread options.

self_drilling_screws.name: Self-Drilling Screws
self_drilling_screws.desc: Drill point screws for metal-to-metal applications. No pre-drilling required.

bolts.name: Bolts
bolts.desc: Hex bolts, carriage bolts, and flange bolts in various materials and grades.

nuts.name: Nuts
nuts.desc: Hex nuts, lock nuts, and flange nuts. Standard and custom specifications.

ibr_nails.name: IBR Nails
ibr_nails.desc: Roofing nails for IBR and corrugated steel sheet fixing. Hot-dip galvanized.

q1.q: What is the minimum order quantity?
q1.a: MOQ varies by product, typically 500kg for standard items. Custom orders may have higher MOQs.

q2.a: Carbon steel, stainless steel (304/316), and alloy steel. Various coatings: zinc-plated, galvanized, black oxide, and dacromet.

q3.q: What standards do your products follow?
q3.a: DIN, ANSI, JIS, GB, and ISO standards. Custom specifications are also available.

q4.q: How long is the lead time?
q4.a: Standard items: 15-20 days. Custom orders: 25-35 days depending on specifications.

q5.a: Yes, free samples are available for standard items. Sample shipping cost is borne by the buyer.

q6.q: What payment terms do you accept?
q6.a: T/T, L/C at sight, and Western Union. 30% deposit, 70% before shipment for T/T.
